page.title: Incomes
page.subtitle: Log received income and keep transfer proofs in one place.
page.createDescription: Log income received in the current cycle.
page.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the income and any attached proof.

form.notePlaceholder: e.g. May salary, side gig invoice #42
form.attachmentHint: Drop a transfer proof or click to browse
form.attachmentFormats: JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC, or PDF · 10 MB max
form.attachmentInvalidType: File must be an image (JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC) or PDF.
form.attachmentOversized: File must be 10 MB or smaller.

detail.title: Income details
detail.description: Review this income, then edit or delete it.

export.title: Export incomes
export.description: Download your incomes as a CSV file. Amounts are exported in their original currency.
export.empty: Nothing to export for the selected range.
export.capped: Exported the first {{count}} rows — narrow the date range to export the rest.

import.title: Import incomes
import.descriptionAfter: . The category column matches an income source by name; unmatched ones import as uncategorized. Duplicate rows are not detected.
import.sourcesError: Couldn’t load income sources — rows will import as uncategorized.
import.dropHint: Drop a CSV or click to browse
import.dropFormats: CSV exported from Rinciku, or matching the columns above
import.needSignIn: You need to be signed in to import.
import.sourceNotFound: source “{{name}}” not found — imported as uncategorized

preview.showing: Showing first {{limit}} of {{total}} rows. All valid rows will be imported.

categories.title: Income categories
categories.description: Label where your money comes from — salary, freelance, investments.
categories.empty: No income categories yet — add your first one.
categories.createDescription: Create a new income source label.
categories.editDescription: Update the details of this income category.
categories.deleteDescriptionSuffix: will be removed. Incomes tagged with it stay, but become uncategorized.

categoryForm.name: Name
categoryForm.needSignIn: You need to be signed in to manage income categories.
categoryForm.missingId: Missing income category id for edit.
categoryForm.saveError: Could not save income category. Please try again.

toast.needSignIn: You need to be signed in to log an income.
toast.saveError: Could not save income. Please try again.

errors.dateFuture: Date cannot be in the future
errors.noteTooLong: Note must be 280 characters or fewer
errors.csvAmountInvalid: Amount must be a number greater than 0
